creator: jpaetzel@FreeBSD.org
text:
1. Good catch on the deps

2. Yeah, that was a mistake

3. Also a mistake, I didn't put them back intentionally, I think it would be 
best to leave them in the Makefile as PORTSDOCS.

I'll get everything summarized in a final patch and post it in a few hours.

Thank you for your prompt response.

-- 
Thanks,

Josh Paetzel
FreeBSD -- The power to serve
